name: Bridgewater Elementary
description: Come play pickleball at Bridgewater Elementary in Northfield, MN! There are 6 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Faribault Parks And Recreation
description: Faribault Parks And Recreation is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Faribault, MN. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Meadow's park
description: Come play pickleball at Meadow's park in Faribault, MN! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.

name: Nerstrand City Park
description: Nerstrand City Park is a place to play pickleball in Nerstrand, MN. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free.

name: Northfield Middle School
description: Come play pickleball at Northfield Middle School in Northfield, MN! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Riverside Lions Park
description: Riverside Lions Park is a place to play pickleball in Northfield, MN. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Windsor Park
description: Windsor Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Faribault, MN. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.
